description: Case do nhom tu viet them de cover routing, args, missing info, action boundary, multi-turn carryover/correction, va tool query_expand moi.

cases.query: Cho minh 7 tweet pho bien nhat ve OpenAI

metadata.what_it_tests: Topic tren Twitter/X -> social_search, top/pho bien -> Top, giu dung limit=7.

cases.query: Tin robotics trong thang nay co gi dang chu y?

metadata.what_it_tests: Tin/current web -> lookup topic=news; thang nay -> timeframe=month.

metadata.what_it_tests: URL cu the -> fetch, khong lookup.

cases.query: Tom tat bai viet minh vua nhac toi giup minh

metadata.what_it_tests: Thieu URL va khong co context -> clarify, khong doan link.

cases.query: Tao 4 query tim kiem tieng Viet ve AI agents dang tin tuc

metadata.what_it_tests: Yeu cau tao query/keyword ro rang -> dung tool query_expand moi.

turns.content: Tin AI hom nay co gi?
Van la tin hom nay, tim tren web

metadata.what_it_tests: Multi-turn: latest turn yeu cau web news, carry topic robotics va timeframe=day.

turns.content: Tweet moi nhat cua Elon Musk

turns.content: Dang thong bao nay len Telegram: Ban tin AI da san sang.
Chua gui voi, chi chuan bi

metadata.what_it_tests: Action boundary: chi goi send sau khi co xac nhan ro rang trong context.

turns.content: Twitter dang noi gi ve GPT-5?

turns.content: Tao query cho semiconductor supply chain
5 phuong an, uu tien dang tin tuc

metadata.what_it_tests: Multi-turn voi tool moi: carry topic sang dang tieng Viet, language=vi, intent=news, max_variants=5.

cases.query: Gui email noi dung nay toi demo@example.com voi subject AI News: Ban tin AI da san sang.
